name: Employee Navigator Benefits Administration REST API
what_it_does: Employee Navigator benefits administration REST API for insurance brokers, benefits advisors, and HR technology partners to manage employee benefits enrollment, carrier connections, ACA compliance, and benefits data exchange — enabling automated benefits administration, open enrollment workflow management, carrier EDI feeds, payroll integration, and employee benefits portal connectivity through Employee Navigator's broker-centric cloud benefits platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee enrollment for benefits selection and life event automation, handle plan configuration for benefits plan setup and rate management automation, access carrier connection for insurance carrier EDI data exchange automation, retrieve employee data for benefits eligibility and demographic sync automation, manage open enrollment for benefits selection window automation, handle ACA compliance for 1095-C reporting and tracking automation, access payroll deduction for benefits deduction sync to payroll automation, retrieve COBRA for continuation coverage management automation, manage document for benefits document distribution automation, and integrate Employee Navigator with payroll (ADP, Paychex) and HRIS systems for automated benefits administration data flow.
use_cases: Automating employee benefits enrollment and life event changes for broker benefits administration automation agents
Syncing carrier eligibility data via EDI for insurance carrier connectivity automation agents
Managing open enrollment windows and employee selection tracking for HR automation agents
Integrating benefits deduction data with payroll systems for automated deduction sync automation agents
not_for: Direct insurance underwriting (Employee Navigator is benefits administration, not insurance carrier)
Large enterprise Fortune 500 (Employee Navigator targets SMB and mid-market with benefits brokers)
Retirement/401k administration (Employee Navigator is health and ancillary benefits, not retirement plan admin)
best_when: An insurance broker, benefits advisor, or HR technology company wanting AI agents to automate benefits enrollment management, carrier EDI data exchange, ACA compliance tracking, and payroll integration through Employee Navigator's broker-centric benefits administration platform.
avoid_when: BROKER RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: Employee Navigator is broker-centric; automated direct employer access assumption creates missing_broker_relationship; automated must be or integrate through licensed insurance broker. EDI CARRIER CONNECTIONS REQUIRE SETUP: Carrier EDI connections require specific carrier-by-carrier configuration; automated instant carrier connection assumption creates carrier_not_configured; automated must set up and test EDI connection per carrier. ACA REPORTING HAS DEADLINE SENSITIVITY: ACA 1095-C reporting has IRS deadlines; automated any-time reporting assumption creates late_filing if submission is past ACA deadlines; automated must track and meet IRS ACA filing deadlines. EMPLOYEE CENSUS DATA IS SENSITIVE: Benefits administration involves HIPAA-covered health plan data; automated unrestricted data access assumption creates HIPAA compliance risk; automated must implement HIPAA Business Associate Agreement with Employee Navigator.

auth.notes: Employee Navigator uses OAuth2 + API key for benefits REST API. REST API with JSON. Bethesda, MD HQ. Founded 2008 by George Reese. Products: Benefits Administration, Open Enrollment, ACA Compliance, Carrier Connections, Payroll Integration. 170,000+ companies on platform. 9M+ employees. Primarily broker-driven. Competes with bswift, Businessolver, and PlanSource for benefits administration platform.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Partner sandbox for registered integration partners; production requires broker/partner relationship
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee-per-month pricing; broker partner pricing; integration partner fees
pricing.notes: Bethesda MD. Broker-centric platform. PEPM pricing. 170K+ companies. 9M+ employees. Benefits administration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enrollment and eligibility APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA BAA IS MANDATORY: Employee Navigator handles health plan data; automated non-HIPAA assumption creates compliance_violation; automated must execute HIPAA Business Associate Agreement before accessing health benefits data

OPEN ENROLLMENT DATES ARE STRICT: Employee Navigator enforces open enrollment windows; automated any-time enrollment assumption creates outside_enrollment_period error for off-window changes; automated must check active enrollment periods before submitting elections

CARRIER EDI REQUIRES PER-CARRIER SETUP: Each insurance carrier EDI connection requires separate setup and testing; automated universal carrier connection assumption creates carrier_not_enabled; automated must configure each carrier EDI connection individually

LIFE EVENTS TRIGGER ENROLLMENT WINDOWS: Life events (marriage, birth, job change) open special enrollment periods; automated status-change assumption creates missed_enrollment_opportunity if life event not processed; automated must trigger life event workflow to open special enrollment

PAYROLL DEDUCTION SYNC IS SCHEDULED: Payroll integration syncs on defined schedule, not real-time; automated instant payroll update assumption creates deduction_lag; automated must account for payroll integration schedule when expecting deduction changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Benefits administration. HIPAA, ACA, ERISA. OAuth2. US. Employee health benefits and PII data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Benefits admin. HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee health benefits and PII.
